growth_news.title: University of Utah launches brand new AI degree!
growth_news.description: The University of Utah has officially approved a new bachelor's degree in artificial intelligence. This is super exciting news because it means young learners will get to take cool classes designed specifically to teach them how to build and understand tomorrow's smart technologies.

growth_news.title: AI is helping doctors approve medicine faster!
growth_news.description: The use of artificial intelligence has jumped by a massive 148% at the FDA to help review healthcare data. This means smart computer systems are helping scientists work quicker to make sure new medicines and treatments are safe for families all around the world.

growth_news.title: Global patent experts meet to spark AI creativity
growth_news.description: The world's five largest patent offices met in Tokyo to talk about how artificial intelligence can help protect new inventions. This teamwork ensures that inventors everywhere have the tools they need to share their creations with the world safely.

tech_news.title: Jeff Bezos starts a new bet to build 'Super AI Engineers'
tech_news.description: Amazon's founder Jeff Bezos is funding a project to build an 'Artificial General Engineer.' Imagine a friendly digital robotic buddy that is so smart, it can design, code, and fix computer software all by itself like a master digital mechanic!

tech_news.title: Engineers are reinventing how we build software with AI
tech_news.description: Tech teams are moving to 'AI-native development,' meaning they are using AI as an interactive partner instead of just a basic helper. It is like coding with an ultra-smart co-pilot who writes code on the fly as you talk about what you want your website to do.

tech_news.title: Mbodi AI is building smart robots that learn on their own!
tech_news.description: A new company called Mbodi AI is hiring creators to build 'smart brains' for physical robots. Instead of coding every single tiny step, they are training robots to look at the world, learn from trial and error, and figure out how to help around the house on their own.

jargons.definition: A computer system modeled after the human brain that learns patterns from data.
jargons.example: Think of it like a huge network of tree branches that help a computer pass notes until it guesses the right answer.
jargons.use_case: Helping self-driving cars recognize stop signs and pedestrians.

jargons.definition: A smart mathematical trick that helps computers focus on the most important words in a sentence.
jargons.example: Like reading a book and highlighting only the most exciting action words to understand the plot instantly.
jargons.use_case: Translating languages accurately from English to Spanish without mixing up the order of words.

jargons.definition: A process where an AI searches an external database of trusted information before formulating its response.
jargons.example: Like taking an open-book history quiz where you get to look up facts in a safe, vetted library first.
jargons.use_case: Helping chatbots answer questions about specific school textbooks without making things up.

jargons.definition: A method of training AI models through rewards and corrections.
jargons.example: Like training a digital puppy to fetch—giving it virtual dog treats whenever it does a good job.
jargons.use_case: Teaching AI players to win complicated video games like Chess or Go on their own.

jargons.definition: Taking a pre-trained general AI model and training it further on a small, specific set of data.
jargons.example: Taking a very smart student who knows basic reading, and giving them a special workbook all about dinosaur fossils.
jargons.use_case: Adapting a general chatbot to talk like a friendly space-explorer guide for a science museum.

tools.name: Cursor
tools.trending_factor: Creators and kids love using it because you can ask the editor to write complex programming code in plain English.

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.trending_factor: This tool automatically turns boring homework notes or textbooks into an exciting, entertaining audio podcast show.

tools.name: v0 by Vercel
tools.trending_factor: Allows young creators to describe their dream website in text, and immediately builds a beautiful design they can interact with.

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.trending_factor: It allows anyone to generate highly realistic, gorgeous artwork just by describing their wildest imagination.

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.trending_factor: Perfect for school projects and stories, it allows users to create expressive, life-like voiceovers using AI.
